description: Environment-bound Vitest failures, enforced by scripts/check-environment-failures.mjs (profiles: local, ci). An entry excuses a LOCAL failure only while at least one requiredEnv var is absent; entries with empty requiredEnv are unconditional operator-side probes. Entries that pass while their env is absent (stale) or fail while it is present (mislabeled regression) fail the gate. Additions require audit review.

entries.id: server/ciSecrets.test.ts::CI secrets validation > APP_SESSION_SECRET is set with sufficient length (min 44 chars)
entries.note: vitest fixture sets a dummy APP_SESSION_SECRET, so presence cannot excuse the length assertion; operator-side check

entries.id: server/ciSecrets.test.ts::CI secrets validation > All required GitHub Actions secrets are present and correctly formatted
entries.note: aggregate probe across many secrets; operator-side check
